- content: 'Team Meeting Minutes - May 17, 2024

    Attendee: Emma Johnson, David Lee, Linda Green, Mark Roberts


    Meeting Overview:

    - Discussed the progress of the new project.

    - Reviewed the marketing strategies and upcoming campaigns.

    - Discussed the sales projections and customer feedback.

    '

args.subject: Action item from Team Meeting — coordinate development (due 2024-05-20)
args.body:
Hi David,

Following the Team Meeting (May 17, 2024), you were assigned to coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase. Please:

- Confirm resource availability and the development lead.
- Create a short kickoff plan with key milestones and the first tasks.
- Share an initial status update (1–2 paragraphs) by the deadline below.

Deadline: 2024-05-20.

Please reply to confirm you’ve received this and let me know if you need anything.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action item from Team Meeting — send agenda to John Mitchell (due 2024-05-21)
args.body:
Hi Linda,

Following the Team Meeting (May 17, 2024), you were assigned to email the file ‘meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx’ to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review. Please:

- Attach the file meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx.
- Include a short note asking for feedback and any comments.
- Confirm when the email has been sent and share any reply.

Deadline: 2024-05-21.

Please reply to confirm you’ve sent it or if you need me to send it instead.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action item from Team Meeting — review sales projections (due 2024-05-19)
args.body:
Hi Mark,

Following the Team Meeting (May 17, 2024), you were assigned to review the sales projections and provide feedback. Please:

- Review the attached/available sales projections document(s).
- Provide written feedback or tracked changes on assumptions, numbers, and recommendations.
- Return your comments by the deadline below.

Deadline: 2024-05-19.

Please reply to confirm you’ve received this and indicate when I can expect your feedback.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
